name: airo-js
description: Airo — rendering-only framework for config-driven, plugin-loaded UI.
author: AI/RO contributors

scripts.yalc:publish: pnpm build && pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' exec yalc publish --private
scripts.yalc:push: pnpm build && pnpm -r --filter './packages/*' exec yalc push --private
